title: World of Alice   Shapes of Musical Instruments
description: World of Alice - Shapes of Musical Instruments World of Alice - Shapes of Musical Instruments is an educational game developed for children where they will learn the shape of musical instruments and what their sounds are in a fun way from their cell phone, tablet or computer. Excellent educational resource. In World of Alice, learning is fun.
instructions: Drag the musical instrument that corresponds to the requested shape
tags: free html5 games for your website
